name: Eurofighter Typhoon
description: European twin-engine multirole canard-delta fighter jointly developed by the UK, Germany, Italy, and Spain. Excels in both air-to-air and precision strike roles.

specialAbilities.name: Swing Role
specialAbilities.description: Can switch between air-to-air and air-to-ground modes mid-mission without returning to base.

specialAbilities.name: NATO Interoperability
specialAbilities.description: Full Link 16 integration provides seamless data sharing with allied forces, boosting coalition effectiveness.
